events.title: EU AI Act general application date
events.notes: Most remaining provisions of Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 apply. Article 6(1) and its corresponding obligations apply from 2 August 2027.

events.title: EU AI Act GPAI enforcement powers begin
events.notes: Commission enforcement powers for general-purpose AI provider obligations begin. The GPAI Code of Practice remains a voluntary compliance tool.

_instructions: Add confirmed future effective dates here when an obligation or standard change has been announced before the normal 36/72-hour reporting window.
Only enabled events dated today through the configured one-year horizon are included and grouped into 14-day, 1-month, 3-month, 6-month and 1-year perspectives.
Use primary-source URLs and review dates when official timelines change.
